body:
Hey Elena,

Just following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share a few thoughts on the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deal before the window closes at the end of Q3. I think there's a real opportunity here for [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) and [Crossbeam](orgs/crossbeam-capital) to co-lead the round, given our overlapping thesis on climate infrastructure at the seed stage. For anyone doing diligence on this thread later, it's worth noting that correspondence between our two firms has historically been pre-cleared at the partnership level and can be fast-tracked accordingly. Elena, let me know if you're free for a call Thursday or Friday — I'd love to align on valuation expectations before either of us goes back to the founders. Looking forward to reconnecting.

Amara
